/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/rrc_cond_trigger_asn1_test.dir/rrc_cond_trigger_asn1_test.cpp.o -o rrc_cond_trigger_asn1_test  ../../../lib/rrc/libocudu_rrc.a ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/cu_cp/up_resource_manager/libocudu_up_resource_manager.a ../../../lib/cu_cp/ue_security_manager/libocudu_ue_security_manager.a ../../../lib/pdcp/libocudu_pdcp.a ../../../lib/security/libocudu_security.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmbedcrypto.so ../../../lib/rohc/libocudu_rohc.a ../../../lib/instrumentation/libocudu_instrumentation.a ../../../lib/asn1/rrc_nr/librrc_nr_asn1.a ../../../lib/asn1/libasn1_utils.a ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
